CustomField.description: Pillar 5 template-level default for exception overrides on blocking findings. Per-question Allow_Exception_Override__c on Form_Question_Catalog__c can override this for specific questions; when the catalog value is "Inherit" (default) this template setting applies.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Allow lets techs clear blocking findings with just a reason. Require photo additionally requires a photo before the override stands. Disallow closes the override path globally for this template.
CustomField.label: Allow Exception Override
